content.problemStatement:
Write a program to check if the given number NNN is Armstrong number.

**Note:** Armstrong number is a number that is equal to the sum of its own digits each raised to the power of the number of digits.


Input Format

The first and only line of input contains a single integer, NNN - The number that needs to be checked.


Output Format

Print on a single line:

`YES` if NNN is Armstrong number.
`NO` otherwise.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
131^{\text{3}}13 + 535^{\text{3}}53 + 333^{\text{3}}33 = 1 + 125 + 27 = 153.
The number 153 has 3 digits, so each digit was raised to the power of 3 before summing.

Explanation:
959^{\text{5}}95 + 252^{\text{5}}25 + 757^{\text{5}}75 + 252^{\text{5}}25 + 757^{\text{5}}75 = 59049 + 32 + 16807 + 32 + 16807 = 92727
The number 92727 has 5 digits, so each digit was raised to the power of 5 before summing.
